working_patterns.single_owner: phone-gold-runtime-v14.js owns all phone session lifecycle behavior
working_patterns.pause: cancel active utterance, suppress cancellation completion, retain utterance, replay only after explicit Resume
working_patterns.captions: mount before narration inside active scene; arrival anchor is h1
working_patterns.restart: restart lock then cancel, clear, reset, show silent landing, release lock
working_patterns.start_gate: one Begin with Xen action; no speech or captions before it
working_patterns.navigation: cancel abandoned narration and clear paused state before scene entry

forbidden_patterns: multiple phone JavaScript controllers owning pause, captions, start, or restart
native speechSynthesis.pause/resume as the authoritative iPhone pause implementation
caption slot below the complete arrival title stack
restart that resumes or completes an old utterance
automatic narration before Begin with Xen
